title: Srivatsan Balaji - Portfolio
text:
About
I am a Research Engineer at the Collaborative Robotics and Intelligent Systems (CoRIS) Institute at Oregon State currently developing hardware for underwater robots.
I have a graduate degree in Mechanical Engineering graduate from the University of Washington, Seattle. Prior to that, I completed my undergrad at SRM Institute of Science and Technology in Chennai, India.
My work sits at the intersection of materials, mechanical design and robotics. Outside of work, I am a virtual pilot and a hobbyist photographer.
